title: Reference World Cup Vip Suite Broadcast Keyframe AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference World Cup Vip Suite Broadcast Keyframe AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image ultra-photorealistic FIFA World Cup 2026 VIP-suite broadcast keyframe for uploaded VIP-suite supporter portrait before World Cup broadcast keyframe transformation, preserving same adult woman from the uploaded image. Subject: same adult woman from the uploaded image sits in a VIP suite focused on the match, with preserved identity, facial structure, skin texture, eye color, hairstyle, age, natural micro-expression, and soft smile while brushing wind-blown hair behind her ear and briefly glancing toward camera. Scene: FIFA World Cup 2026 VIP-suite stadium environment with premium seating, glass barrier, pitch view, crowd glow, broadcast-style atmosphere, and realistic match-night detail. Composition: Fixed broadcast close-medium portrait keyframe: subject framed from upper body, stadium visible around and behind, natural posture shift, hair moving in a gentle breeze, and a candid celebrity-like screen presence. Signature Elements: Preserved reference world cup vip suite broadcast keyframe source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-photorealistic sports broadcast still, cinematic VIP-suite realism, authentic micro-expression, natural blinking feel, realistic fabric and hair motion, and premium telephoto match coverage. Lighting: Mixed stadium light and VIP-suite ambient light, eye sparkle, soft facial highlights, natural skin detail, and believable reflections on glass and blazer fabric. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
